mappings.control_name: Protect all code from unauthorised access — embedding store protection
mappings.notes: Classify embedding stores and vector databases as sensitive AI artefacts; apply access controls, encryption at rest/in transit, and audit logging

mappings.control_name: Test for security vulnerabilities — embedding adversarial testing
mappings.notes: Conduct adversarial testing of retrieval pipelines including embedding inversion, retrieval poisoning, and semantic search manipulation scenarios

mappings.control_name: Analyse root causes — embedding incident forensics
mappings.notes: When an embedding or retrieval security incident occurs, conduct forensic analysis of the vector store, ingestion pipeline, and query patterns

mappings.control_name: Reuse existing well-secured software — vector store vetting
mappings.notes: Vet vector database platforms and embedding model providers for security posture before adoption; review access control capabilities

mappings.control_name: Protection of Information at Rest — embedding store protection
mappings.notes: Encrypt vector databases and embedding stores at rest; enforce access controls and audit logging on all embedding read and write operations

mappings.control_name: Malicious Code Protection — adversarial embedding detection
mappings.notes: Extend malicious code protection to detect adversarial manipulation of embeddings — poisoned vectors, out-of-distribution injections, and embedding inversion attacks
Include vector databases, embedding pipelines, and retrieval infrastructure in vulnerability scanning; test for injection, access control bypass, and data extraction
Enforce role-based access control on vector database operations; restrict who can read, write, and delete embeddings

mappings.control_name: Protection and Prevention — embedding store protection

Include vector database and embedding pipeline security in resilience testing; test for injection, access control bypass, and data extraction from embeddings
Register vector databases, embedding models, and retrieval infrastructure in the ICT asset inventory with classification per data sensitivity
Monitor embedding stores for unauthorised modifications, anomalous writes, and bulk access patterns indicative of extraction or poisoning
